brand.name: AdOff
brand.mission_en: Universal ad blocker with stealth anti-detection. Invisible to anti-adblock walls. Privacy-first, zero tracking.
brand.mission_it: Ad blocker universale con stealth anti-detection. Invisibile ai sistemi anti-adblock. Privacy-first, zero tracking.

voice.perspective: we (team voice) for product, you (direct) for user
voice.sentence_length_pref: short to medium, one idea per sentence
voice.emoji_policy: 1-2 max per post, only when adds value (🛡️ ✅ ❌ ⚡ 🔒)

official_claims_safe: works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, Opera
stops video ads invisible to anti-adblock walls

visual.imagery_style: minimal, dark-mode-first, geometric, no stock photos, no people faces, no flashy colors

personas.name: Privacy Advocate
personas.example_hook: Your browser sends 3,000+ tracking requests per day. Most go to companies you've never heard of.

personas.name: Tech Geek
personas.example_hook: MV3 broke a lot of ad blockers. We rebuilt the entire approach with declarativeNetRequest + IMA SDK stub.

personas.name: Average User
personas.example_hook: Tired of watching 30-second video ads before every 2-minute clip?

personas.name: Founder Perspective
personas.example_hook: We launched 2 months ago. 1,200 users. Zero ads. Here's what we learned.

reddit.tone_shift: more authentic, less promotional, no link without context
reddit.anti_promotional_rule: Reddit hates ads. Never start with brand. Always provide value first.

blog_post.structure: hook, problem, agitate, solution, evidence, CTA

press_email.structure: personalized hook (1 line) + 1 specific reason for THEIR audience + soft CTA

quora_answer.structure: direct answer first, then context, then product mention (only if relevant)

regulatory_safe_claims: We do not collect personal data

few_shot_examples.text:
Most ad blockers fail on video platforms. Anti-adblock walls detect them in seconds.

AdOff doesn't get detected. We rebuilt blocking from scratch with MV3 + stealth IMA stub.

30 days free Pro. No card. adoff.app
few_shot_examples.performance_note: concrete tech detail + clear differentiator + no-friction CTA

few_shot_examples.text:
Quick MV3 ad blocker deep dive 🛡️

Manifest V3 killed dynamic rule injection. Most blockers downgraded.

We built around declarativeNetRequest with 130+ rules + an IMA SDK stub that emits CONTENT_RESUME_REQUESTED. Zero detection on video platforms.

FOSS rules. Source visible.

adoff.app
few_shot_examples.performance_note: specific MV3 terminology + technical novelty + FOSS angle

few_shot_examples.text:
I was watching a 90-second video tutorial yesterday. Pre-roll: 35 seconds. Mid-roll: 20 seconds. Total wasted: 55 seconds on 90 of content.

That's 38% of my time spent on ads.

I'm a regular user, not a privacy nerd. I just want to watch the thing I clicked on. Found AdOff last week, blocks all of them including the anti-adblock walls that pop up on some sites. Free trial gave me 30 days, decided to keep it.

Anyone else hitting the wall on ad fatigue these days?
few_shot_examples.performance_note: personal story, concrete numbers, no upfront brand push, ends as discussion
